form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== lineNo[行号] costType[成本类型] sourceBillType[来源单据类型] sourceBillCode[来源单号] businessDate[业务日期] =========>amount[金额信息]====== amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] exchangeRate[汇率] currencyId[币种] =========>posting[过账信息]====== postedTransferFlag[已转出] =========>reference[业务关联]====== cipId[在建工程] capitalizationId[资本化单] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== lineNo[行号] costType[成本类型] sourceBillType[来源单据类型] sourceBillCode[来源单号] businessDate[业务日期] =========>amount[金额信息]====== amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] exchangeRate[汇率] currencyId[币种] =========>posting[过账信息]====== postedTransferFlag[已转出] =========>reference[业务关联]====== cipId[在建工程] capitalizationId[资本化单] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: lineNo[行号] costType[成本类型] cipId[在建工程] capitalizationId[资本化单] businessDate[业务日期]
